testcase.name: [1.1:9] TOKEN1
testcase.system-err: SLF4J(W): No SLF4J providers were found. SLF4J(W): Defaulting to no-operation (NOP) logger implementation SLF4J(W): See https://www.slf4j.org/codes.html#noProviders for further details.

testcase.name: [1:3] Try attack by user and password

failure.message: match failed: EQUALS $ | data types don't match (MAP:NULL) {"user":"admin","pass":"password123","token":"8e2c9f4cbec4421"} null

testcase.failure:
java.lang.AssertionError: match failed: EQUALS $ | data types don't match (MAP:NULL) {"user":"admin","pass":"password123","token":"8e2c9f4cbec4421"} null
at io.karatelabs.core.StepExecutor.executeMatch(StepExecutor.java:1219) at io.karatelabs.core.StepExecutor.execute(StepExecutor.java:174) at io.karatelabs.core.ScenarioRuntime.call(ScenarioRuntime.java:825) at io.karatelabs.core.FeatureRuntime.executeScenario(FeatureRuntime.java:284) at io.karatelabs.core.FeatureRuntime.call(FeatureRuntime.java:141) at io.karatelabs.core.Suite.runFeatureSafely(Suite.java:375) at io.karatelabs.core.Suite.runSequential(Suite.java:360) at io.karatelabs.core.Suite.run(Suite.java:306) at io.karatelabs.core.Runner$Builder.parallel(Runner.java:634) at io.karatelabs.junit6.Karate.lambda$stream$0(Karate.java:289) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.CompletableFuture$AsyncRun.run(CompletableFuture.java:1804) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.CompletableFuture$AsyncRun.exec(CompletableFuture.java:1796) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.ForkJoinTask.doExec(ForkJoinTask.java:507) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.ForkJoinPool$WorkQueue.topLevelExec(ForkJoinPool.java:1489) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.ForkJoinPool.scan(ForkJoinPool.java:2071) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.ForkJoinPool.runWorker(ForkJoinPool.java:2033) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.ForkJoinWorkerThread.run(ForkJoinWorkerThread.java:187)

testcase.name: [1:7] GBK-EP-01 - Get booking detail by id
[2:28] GBK-EP2-02 - Miền dữ liệu không hợp lệ
[1:6] GBK-EP-01 get booking ids and validate response
[2:15] GBK-EP-02 - Filter theo firstname tồn tại
[3:23] GBK-EP-03 - Filter theo lastname tồn tại
[4:31] GBK-EP-04 - Filter kết hợp firstname + lastname
[5:41] GBK-EP-05 - Filter không khớp bất kỳ record nào
[8:64] GBK-BVA-03 - checkin ngày hợp lệ đúng format
[9:71] GBK-BVA-04 - checkin sai định dạng

[3:37] DEL-EP-03 xoá không hợp lệ: token sai

[3:52] UPD-EP-03 cập nhật không hợp lệ: Token sai
